chart.title: Annual change in forest area
chart.note: This data is calculated as the average annual change based on either ten- or five-year changes in forest area. The exact change may differ from year to year over this period.
chart.citation: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025)

Annual change in forest area.descriptionShort: Net change in forest area measures forest expansion (the sum of afforestation and natural expansion) minus deforestation.
Annual change in forest area.descriptionProcessing: Annual forest area values are linearly interpolated for missing years, based on available data points from the FAO Forest Resources Assessment (FRA) reports.
Annual change in forest area.citationShort: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025) – with major processing by Our World in Data
Annual change in forest area.citationLong: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025) – with major processing by Our World in Data. “Annual change in forest area” [dataset]. Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations, “Global Forest Resources Assessment 2025” [original data].
